hero.title: Defuse Division Wiki
hero.description: Defuse Division is a Roblox team-based tactical shooter where attackers plant the bomb and defenders stop the plant, defuse it, or wipe the enemy team. Browse codes, weapons, skins, maps, settings, crosshair tips, and round-winning guides.

gameFeature.description: Defuse Division is a Roblox team-based tactical bomb-defusal shooter where attackers plant the bomb at a bombsite while defenders prevent the plant, defuse the device, or eliminate the enemy team to take the round.

defuseDivisionCodes.title: Defuse Division Codes
defuseDivisionCodes.intro: Redeem the latest Defuse Division codes for free Credits, weapon skins, and alpha-tester rewards. New codes drop during milestones and community events, so bookmark this page and check back regularly.

codes.reward: Alpha Tester Bundle: 2,000 Credits + Exclusive Spray

redeemSteps: Launch Defuse Division on Roblox and load into a match lobby.
Press N to open the main menu and locate the Codes input box.
Type or paste a code exactly as shown — Defuse Division codes are case-sensitive.
Press Redeem to instantly claim your Credits, skins, and rewards.

defuseDivisionBeginnerGuide.title: Defuse Division Beginner Guide
defuseDivisionBeginnerGuide.intro: New to Defuse Division? This starter guide walks you through your first rounds, from joining a match and picking a side to planting, defusing, and closing out wins as a team.

steps.title: Join a Match
steps.description: Queue into a public or private server. Defuse Division splits players into attackers and defenders across compact tactical bombsite maps built for fast, decisive rounds.

steps.title: Learn Your Side's Objective
steps.description: Attackers carry the bomb, plant at a bombsite, and defend it until detonation. Defenders prevent the plant, retake the site, or defuse the bomb before the timer ends.

steps.title: Communicate and Trade
steps.description: Stick with teammates, call out enemy positions, and trade eliminations. Defuse Division rewards coordinated pushes and crossfires over solo hero plays.

steps.title: Win the Round
steps.description: A round ends when the bomb detonates, gets defused, or one team is fully eliminated. Take the required round count to win the match and bank your Credits.

quickTips: Press N to open the main menu and M to open the team-select menu.
Spend Credits at the start of each round on weapons, armor, and utility.
Watch the bomb timer once it's planted — every second counts for the defuser.
Save Credits on lost rounds so your team can afford a full buy next round.

defuseDivisionTierList.title: Defuse Division Tier List
defuseDivisionTierList.intro: Our Defuse Division tier list ranks the strongest roles and playstyles for winning rounds. Tiers reflect overall impact across bombsites, economy management, and clutch potential.

tiers.label: Entry Fragger & AWPer
tiers.description: Aggressive first-contact roles that open bombsites and lock down long angles with high-damage weapons.

tiers.label: Support & Lurker
tiers.description: Reliable roles that trade eliminations, smoke off enemy sightlines, and flank unaware teams for multi-kills.

tiers.label: Rifler & Anchor
tiers.description: Consistent mid-range fighters that hold crossfires, reposition between bombsites, and stabilize defense.

tiers.label: Eco & Pistol Round
tiers.description: Specialist loadouts that shine on low-credit force and pistol rounds but fall off once both teams full-buy.

defuseDivisionMechanics.title: Defuse Division Game Mechanics
defuseDivisionMechanics.intro: Understand the core systems that decide every round of Defuse Division — round flow, the bomb timer, win conditions, team coordination, and the economy that powers your loadouts.

items.content: Defuse Division matches run in timed rounds. Attackers and defenders spawn on opposite sides of the map, and each round resets weapons, utility, and starting positions for both teams.
Once the bomb is planted at a bombsite, a countdown begins. Defenders must locate and defuse it before detonation, while attackers hold the site and run down the clock to win.
A round is won by planting and detonating the bomb, defusing the planted bomb, or eliminating the entire enemy team. The first side to claim the target number of rounds wins the match.
Communication and positioning decide rounds. Trading eliminations, holding crossfires, and timing utility usage let coordinated teams overpower raw aim and win consistently.
Each round awards Credits for eliminations, objectives, and round outcomes. Managing your economy across rounds keeps your team armed with rifles, armor, and utility when it matters most.

defuseDivisionControlsSettings.title: Defuse Division Controls & Settings
defuseDivisionControlsSettings.intro: Master the Defuse Division control scheme on PC, mobile, and console. Every input — from movement and aim to bomb plant, defuse, and the menu where you tune sensitivity, crosshair, and audio — is mapped here so you build muscle memory faster and never fumble a clutch.

controls.input: W A S D / Left Stick
controls.function: Drive your operator through bombsites, rotation routes, and cover.
Track enemies, hold angles, and snap to clean crosshair placement.
Pick up the bomb, open doors, and trigger objective devices.
Shoot, pre-fire angles, and trade eliminations with your team.
Plant at a bombsite as attacker, or defuse the device as defender.
Redeem codes and adjust sensitivity, keybinds, audio, and crosshair.

defuseDivisionMapsGuide.title: Defuse Division Maps Guide
defuseDivisionMapsGuide.intro: Read every Defuse Division map like a veteran. This guide breaks down bombsites, spawn zones, mid control, chokepoints, rotation paths, and the common angles that decide whether your team holds the site or gets picked off in the open.

areas.title: Bomb Sites A & B
areas.description: The two planted-objective zones where attackers commit to a plant and defenders retake to defuse. Site selection drives the round's utility plan and positioning.

areas.title: Spawn Areas
areas.description: Attacker and defender spawn zones that set early-round positioning, default buys, and the first rotations toward mid or bombsites.

areas.title: Mid Control
areas.description: The central map region that unlocks short rotations to both bombsites, lets attackers split pushes, and pressures enemy map control.

areas.title: Chokepoints
areas.description: Narrow passages and doorways that funnel engagements — holding or smoking these off decides where fights happen and who holds the advantage.

areas.title: Rotation Routes
areas.description: The fastest paths between bombsites and spawn, used to rotate defenders onto a planted site or to fake and reposition as attackers.

areas.title: Common Angles
areas.description: Pre-aimed corners, head glitches, and off-angles where defenders hold or attackers clear — the foundation of consistent crosshair placement.

defuseDivisionUpdatesPatchNotes.title: Defuse Division Updates & Patch Notes
defuseDivisionUpdatesPatchNotes.intro: Track every Defuse Division update as the meta evolves. This section summarizes the balance tuning, new content, bug fixes, and gameplay system changes that shift the competitive landscape from patch to patch.

updates.title: Balance Adjustments
updates.content: Weapon damage, recoil patterns, movement acceleration, and economy rewards are tuned each patch to keep the competitive meta fair and stop any single gun or strategy from dominating Defuse Division rounds.

updates.title: New Content
updates.content: Patches ship new maps, weapons, skins, and limited-time events that expand the strategic options and give attackers and defenders fresh tools to break stalemate positions.

updates.title: Bug Fixes
updates.content: Stability and performance fixes target crashes, hit-registration edge cases, and map exploits so every round plays out exactly as the rules intend.

updates.title: Gameplay System Changes
updates.content: Core systems — plant time, defuse time, round length, and Credits economy — are adjusted to keep rounds tense, readable, and competitive at every skill tier.

defuseDivisionTipsTricks.title: Defuse Division Tips & Tricks
defuseDivisionTipsTricks.intro: Climb the Defuse Division ranks with the habits that win rounds. These advanced tips cover early positioning, trading, utility timing, objective control, and team play — the decisions that separate frag hunters from round winners.

tips.title: Take Early Map Control
tips.description: Push for mid or key chokepoints at round start so your team owns the rotations and forces the enemy into predictable, retakeable positions.

tips.title: Trade Every Elimination
tips.description: Stay close enough to teammates that the instant one falls, you swing and trade the kill — keeping your team's numbers even and pressure constant.

tips.title: Time Your Utility
tips.description: Hold smokes, flashes, and grenades for the exact moment you plant, retake, or push a chokepoint so utility forces movement instead of being wasted.

tips.title: Play the Bomb Timer
tips.description: Once planted, attackers run down the clock and defenders commit to a defuse — read the timer, fake defuses, and coordinate the retake to win post-plant situations.

tips.title: Avoid Isolated Fights
tips.description: Wandering alone hands the enemy isolated picks and map control. Stay near trade range of a teammate so every engagement becomes a 2-on-1 in your favor.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Defuse Division on Roblox.

questions.question: What is Defuse Division?
questions.answer: Defuse Division is a Roblox team-based tactical bomb-defusal shooter developed by Fourteam. Attackers plant the bomb while defenders prevent the plant, defuse the device, or eliminate the enemy team to win each round.

questions.question: Is Defuse Division free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Defuse Division is free to play on Roblox across PC, Mac, mobile, and any device that supports the Roblox app, with optional in-game cosmetics and cases.

questions.question: Where do I redeem Defuse Division codes?
questions.answer: Launch Defuse Division, press N to open the main menu, find the Codes input, type a code exactly as shown (codes are case-sensitive), and redeem it for free Credits, skins, and rewards.

questions.question: How many players can play Defuse Division?
questions.answer: Defuse Division supports team-based matches with up to 14 players split across attackers and defenders on tactical bombsite maps designed for competitive round play.

questions.question: Is Defuse Division affiliated with Valve or Counter-Strike?
questions.answer: No. Defuse Division is a fan-created Roblox game by Fourteam and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Valve, Counter-Strike, or Steam. It is inspired by the tactical bomb-defusal genre.

questions.question: What platforms is Defuse Division on?
questions.answer: Defuse Division runs on Roblox, so you can play on PC, Mac, iOS, Android, and Xbox wherever the Roblox app is available, with cross-platform matchmaking.
